rulings.Case Title: ALVIN MATTHEWS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, January 21, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Pneumo Abex LLC's motion for summary judgment is denied. Plaintiff's declaration creates a triable issue regarding exposure to "American Brakeblok" brake linings. The interrogatory responses of Pneumo Abex create a triable issue whether Pneumo Abex manufactured "American Brakeblok" brake linings and whether the linings contained asbestos during the relevant time period. Defendant's objections to plaintiff's declaration and its interrogatory responses are overruled. Summary adjudication as to causes of action for negligence and strict liability is denied for same reasons. Summary adjudication as to causes of action for concert of action and fraud, deceit/negligent misrepresentation/concealment is granted because plaintiff does not dispute the non-existence of any triable facts with respect to these causes of action. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES GUTHRIE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Kaiser Gypsum'S Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, January 21, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied provided that plaintiff provides signed copies of his declaration and the declaration of Charles Ay prior to the hearing. Otherwise, the motion is granted. Plaintiff raises a triable issue regarding asbestos exposure through his declaration and the declaration of Charles Ay. Except for the objections based on unsigned declarations, defendant's evidentiary objections are overruled. =(220/HEK)
